title: Marksman Handheld Butane Gas Weed Burner Blaster Killer Torch Wand Plant Moss Garden blowtorch
features: This great value weed burner is easy to use and allows you to kill plants and weeds without the use of hazardous chemicals.
Using the adjustable flame you simply heat the plant or weed, destroying the internal cell structures causing the plant or weed to wither and die within a couple of days.
The cordless design makes the burner extremely portable and the handy 80cm length limits the need for bending.
Kills weeds without the use of hazardous chemicals
Please note: Gas canisters are not included
description: Marksman Handheld Butane Gas Weed Burner Blaster Killer Torch Wand Plant Moss Garden blowtorch
